description: Product description Whether you are hosting or attending a Hawaiian party, beach party, luau party, beach party, pool party, aloha party, carnival party, corporate party, music festival, or birthday party, the Hawaiian flower lei is sure to be the perfect addition to your party. Our Hawaiian lei garlands are not only a great accessory for Hawaiian-themed dance performances, you can also use them to decorate your room and yard, or take it apart to make artwork, headpieces and more. Hawaiian garlands are the best gift for your family and friends, like mom, grandmom, wife, girlfriend, lover, fiancee, daughter, son, aunt, uncle, or even yourself.
